violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was at the Blackstone Bar, and Shipyard Bar was lacking paper towels. Paper towels must be available at all handsinks. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The hand-washing sink at Plume Bar, Plume Service kitchen, and Lighthouse Bar was blocked by a strainer. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Working containers of dry food items are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The doors to the outside, located in the banquet kitchen hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine) sanitizing solution for the low temp dishwashers. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The floor by the banquet kitchen walk in cooler was observed with tiles in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor by the banquet kitchen dishwasher was observed with areas of low grout an in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2026

ROP Clam Chowder was observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Clam Chowder was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Sliced Cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2026

Salad Unit was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Hard Boiled Eggs were observed at 49DF. Hard Boiled Eggs were voluntarily Disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Knives were observed stored on an unclean surface (between units) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quat sanitizing solution for the three bay. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
The grout for the tile floor located through out the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2026
The wall behind the dishwasher is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The door to the outside, located in the hallway leading to the kitchen and entering into the even space, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The cutting boards in the banquet kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walls behind the dishwasher have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
The lights above the fryolator and grill line were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2025

The two door stand up on the grill line was observed held at 46 Degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Blue Cheese and Clam stock were observed held at 46 DF. Food items voluntarily Disposed of. The Salad Prep unit was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Hard boiled eggs, and cheese were observed held at 49 DF. Food items voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pasta was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Pasta was only placed in Walk in less then one hour prior to inspection, Pasta was moved to Walk in freezer for rapid cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets on the Longo's Prep unit, The Fred and Steves reach in and on the grill line warmer were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2025
The wall behind the dishwasher is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Prep unit was observed held at (48) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cheese was observed at 48DF cheese was voluntarily disposed of. All other food items were moved to working unit. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Prep unit 1 located on the grill line area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

Chicken, cheeses, raw fish, garlic butter, were observed held at between 43-50 degrees Fahrenheit at the low boy unit. Ambient temperature of the unit was at 46 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge food items were stored in unit overnight, food items were voluntarily disposed of. Service was called during inspection. Ambient temperature at the end of the inspection 38F. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2023

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice bin, some refrigerator gaskets, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2023
